marker_explanations.MZB1: Highly expressed in plasma cells, involved in antibody secretion.
marker_explanations.JCHAIN: Essential for IgA and IgM polymerization, specific to plasma cells.
marker_explanations.SDC1: Also known as CD138, a canonical plasma cell surface marker.
marker_explanations.SLAMF7: Expressed on plasma cells and used to distinguish them from other B cells.
marker_explanations.CD38: Highly expressed on plasma cells, used as a diagnostic marker.

marker_explanations.EPCAM: A pan-epithelial marker highly expressed in epithelial and carcinoma cells.
marker_explanations.PROM1: Also known as CD133, a marker of cancer stem cells in colorectal cancer.
marker_explanations.MUC13: A mucin gene upregulated in colorectal adenocarcinoma epithelial cells.
marker_explanations.SPINK1: Overexpressed in various cancers, including colorectal cancer epithelial cells.
marker_explanations.S100P: Frequently upregulated in colorectal cancer and associated with tumor progression.
marker_explanations.CD24: A cell surface marker enriched in colorectal cancer stem and epithelial cells.

marker_explanations.CPA3: Carboxypeptidase A3 is a classic mast cell-specific protease.
marker_explanations.HPGDS: Hematopoietic prostaglandin D synthase is highly expressed in mast cells.
marker_explanations.IL1RL1: Also known as ST2, a receptor expressed on mast cells.
marker_explanations.GATA2: Transcription factor essential for mast cell development.
marker_explanations.LTC4S: Leukotriene C4 synthase is involved in mast cell mediator synthesis.
marker_explanations.RGS13: Regulator of G-protein signaling enriched in mast cells.

marker_explanations.CSF1R: Key receptor for macrophage colony-stimulating factor, highly expressed in macrophages.
marker_explanations.CD14: Co-receptor for LPS, classic monocyte/macrophage marker.
marker_explanations.C1QA: Complement component highly expressed in tissue macrophages.
marker_explanations.AIF1: Also known as IBA1, a microglia/macrophage marker.
marker_explanations.FCGR3A: Fc gamma receptor III, expressed in monocytes/macrophages.
marker_explanations.TREM1: Amplifies inflammatory responses in myeloid cells, including macrophages.

marker_explanations.PDGFRA: Classical marker of fibroblasts, especially in colorectal cancer stroma.
marker_explanations.COL3A1: Encodes type III collagen, highly expressed in fibroblasts and extracellular matrix-producing cells.
marker_explanations.ADH1B: Frequently marks fibroblasts in colorectal and other tissues.
marker_explanations.PDGFRB: Another key fibroblast marker, often co-expressed with PDGFRA in stromal cells.
marker_explanations.PRELP: Extracellular matrix protein, enriched in fibroblasts.
marker_explanations.FRZB: Wnt signaling modulator, expressed in fibroblasts within tumor stroma.

marker_explanations.CD8A: Encodes the CD8 alpha chain, a definitive marker of CD8+ cytotoxic T cells.
marker_explanations.GZMA: Granzyme A is a cytotoxic molecule expressed by activated CD8+ T cells.
marker_explanations.CD2: A pan-T cell marker, present on all T cells including CD8+ subsets.
marker_explanations.CD247: Part of the T cell receptor-CD3 complex, essential for T cell activation.
marker_explanations.TIGIT: An inhibitory receptor commonly expressed on activated and exhausted CD8+ T cells.
marker_explanations.ICOS: A co-stimulatory molecule upregulated on activated T cells, including CD8+ subsets.
